reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.whathifi.com/best-buys/hi-fi/best-turntables and extract every turntable they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their star rating or award, price, drive type (belt/direct), whether it has a built-in phono stage, pros with specific sound quality observations, cons with specific flaws.

Go to https://www.cnet.com/tech/home-entertainment/best-record-player-and-turntable/ and extract every turntable they recommend. For each product get: full product name, ranking or award (Best Overall, Best Budget, etc.), price, key features, pros with specific details from testing, cons.

Go to https://vinylpickup.com/best-turntables/ and extract every turntable they recommend. For each product get: full product name, ranking or category, price, drive type, cartridge included, pros with specific measurements or sound quality notes, cons.

Go to https://www.techradar.com/audio/turntables/the-best-turntables and extract every turntable they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their rating or award, price, key features, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.stereonet.com/features/best-turntables-vinyl-2026 and extract every turntable mentioned with awards or recommendations. For each product get: full product name, award or ranking, price if listed, key features, pros with specific observations, cons or caveats.
